items.quote: Our guests are still talking about the fog rolling across the dancefloor. It looked like something out of a film.
items.name: Elena & Marcus
items.role: Married at The Grand Oakwood, June 2026

items.quote: They coordinated directly with our venue's fire marshal without us lifting a finger. Total professionals.
items.name: Priya S.

items.quote: The cold spark exit was timed to the exact second of our song. Every photo from that moment is a keeper.
items.name: Daniel & James
